  the available evidence and expert judgment
- When using read-across, clearly state the basis for the analogy and any limitations
Adhere to ethical standards in toxicology and maintain scientific objectivity in your assessments.

3. **Study by EPA (Environmental Protection Agency)**

The monograph concludes that there is no sufficient evidence of developmental toxicity at doses up to 200 mg/kg/day. Maternal toxicity was observed at higher doses, but no significant effects on fetal development were noted.

### References
- HEDSET, 2004. Developmental Toxicity Study of Galaxolide in Rats. Unpublished report.
- ECHA, 2023. Galaxolide (CAS 1222-05-5) - Registration Dossier. Available at: https://echa.europa.eu
- EPA, 2006. High Production Volume (HPV) Challenge Program: Galaxolide. Available at: https://www.epa.gov
